
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 6 - "Line Weights and Line Styles".

The examples for this chapter require 31 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	bevljn1.ps
	bevljn2.ps
	buttcap1.ps
	buttcap2.ps
	dasharc1.ps (1)
	dasharc2.ps
	dashed1.ps
	dashed2.ps
	dashed3.ps
	dashed4.ps
	dashed5.ps
	dashed6.ps (2)
	dashed7.ps
	joincap.ps
	miterjn1.ps
	miterjn2.ps
	mtrlimit.ps
	rndcap1.ps
	rndcap2.ps
	rndjoin1.ps
	rndjoin2.ps
	scaling1.ps
	scaling2.ps
	scaling3.ps
	scaling4.ps
	sqrcap1.ps
	sqrcap2.ps
	tricks1.ps
	tricks2.ps

(1)	The book listing had a closepath instruction which should not have
	been there. The example on this disk removed it.
	
(2)	This example uses a procedure called ellipse. That procedure was not
	listed in chapter 6 in the book. The procedure is included in this
	example on the disk.
	
